commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a managed-proxy CONNECT guard to the local debug proxy, documents the diagnostics override, adds regression coverage, and records a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: start the debug proxy with `OPENCLAW_PROXY_ACTIVE=1` and issue an HTTP CONNECT request; current main reaches the direct `net.connect()` path, while the PR adds a reject-path regression test.
commands.review_followup: Draft maintainer-labeled PR with a security-sensitive proxy policy change and a narrow test artifact finding; route through normal maintainer review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: guard debug proxy CONNECT under managed proxy
